Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can only hope that this recording[n]reaches someone with a conscience...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My employer has become[n]obsessed with a loathsome idea.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm afraid the damage will be staggering.[n]At this point, it's unavoidable...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_4_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But... I didn't have a choice... If I didn't do this...[n]it could have destroyed the entire world![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Whoever is watching this, please...[n]I need you to listen to me very carefully.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Shadows that were amassed here have[n]been dispersed as a result of the explosion.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}In order to end this, you have no[n]choice but to eliminate all of them![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I am the one responsible for this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I knew the risks, but I was blinded by the promise of[n]success... And so, I chose to continue without objections.[n]{f 1 1}
